title: Office / Shop Space – Ife Central
description: Versatile commercial space suited for an office or retail business in Ife Central. Includes a reception area and private back room. Centrally located with easy access from major roads in the city.

reviews.name: Emeka T.
reviews.text: Perfect location for a small business. My customers can easily find me here.

reviews.name: Fatima L.
reviews.text: Clean, accessible and affordable for the area. Recommend it.
